requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 EV Charging System Safety — SLSI Baseline
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851电动汽车充电系统安全——SLSI基线
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851電動汽車充電系統安全——SLSI基線

summary.en: Sri Lanka Standards Institution (SLSI) adopts IEC standards as the technical baseline for electrical equipment. For EV charging equipment, IEC 61851-1 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements) is the expected primary safety standard. IEC 61851-1 covers the conductive charging interface, protective provisions, electrical safety, and operational requirements for AC and DC charging. SLSI may require product registration or conformity evidence before importation and sale of EV chargers; importers should confirm the current SLSI type-approval or registration requirement before shipment.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡标准局（SLSI）采用IEC标准作为电气设备的技术基线。对于电动汽车充电设备，IEC 61851-1（电动汽车传导充电系统——通用要求）为预期的主要安全标准，涵盖传导充电接口、保护措施、电气安全以及交流和直流充电的操作要求。SLSI可能要求进口和销售电动汽车充电设备前提供产品注册或符合性证据；进口商在出货前应确认当前SLSI型式批准或注册要求。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡標準局（SLSI）採用IEC標準作為電氣設備的技術基線。對於電動汽車充電設備，IEC 61851-1（電動汽車傳導充電系統——通用要求）為預期的主要安全標準，涵蓋傳導充電接口、保護措施、電氣安全以及交流和直流充電的操作要求。SLSI可能要求進口和銷售電動汽車充電設備前提供產品注冊或符合性證據；進口商在出貨前應確認當前SLSI型式批准或注冊要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1: Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-21-1: EMC requirements for on-board charger
SLSI type-approval or registration requirements for EV charging equipment

summary.en: China uses GB/T 18487.1-2015 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements) as the national standard for EV charging systems. GB/T 18487.1 is technically aligned with but not identical to IEC 61851-1, and Chinese test reports to GB/T 18487 are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 61851 evidence in Sri Lanka.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 18487.1-2015（电动汽车传导充电系统——第1部分：通用要求）作为电动汽车充电系统国家标准。GB/T 18487.1与IEC 61851-1技术上对应但并不相同，中国GB/T 18487测试报告不被斯里兰卡接受为IEC 61851证据的替代。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 18487.1-2015（電動汽車傳導充電系統——第1部分：通用要求）作為電動汽車充電系統國家標準。GB/T 18487.1與IEC 61851-1技術上對應但並不相同，中國GB/T 18487測試報告不被斯里蘭卡接受為IEC 61851證據的替代。

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 18487 test reports do not substitute for IEC 61851 test evidence recognised by SLSI. Exporters should obtain IEC 61851-1 test reports from an internationally accredited laboratory, confirm SLSI registration or type-approval requirements for EV chargers before shipment, and prepare English-language technical documentation. In addition, the connector type must be IEC 62196-compatible for Sri Lanka market deployment (see connector fragment).
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 18487测试报告不能替代SLSI认可的IEC 61851测试证据。出口商应从国际认可实验室取得IEC 61851-1测试报告，出货前向SLSI确认电动汽车充电设备注册或型式批准要求，并准备英文技术文件。此外，接口类型须兼容IEC 62196，以适应斯里兰卡市场部署（见接口差距条目）。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 18487測試報告不能替代SLSI認可的IEC 61851測試證據。出口商應從國際認可實驗室取得IEC 61851-1測試報告，出貨前向SLSI確認電動汽車充電設備注冊或型式批准要求，並準備英文技術文件。此外，接口類型須兼容IEC 62196，以適應斯里蘭卡市場部署（見接口差距條目）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where SLSI type-approval or registration applies to EV chargers; IEC 61851-1 is the technical standard baseline
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB/T 18487.1-2015 for domestic Chinese EV charger market

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 18487 test reports do not satisfy SLSI IEC 61851 requirements. Obtain IEC 61851-1 test evidence from an accredited laboratory and confirm SLSI registration requirements before shipping EV chargers to Sri Lanka.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 18487测试报告不满足SLSI IEC 61851要求。出货斯里兰卡电动汽车充电设备前，需从认可实验室取得IEC 61851-1测试证据并确认SLSI注册要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 18487測試報告不滿足SLSI IEC 61851要求。出貨斯里蘭卡電動汽車充電設備前，需從認可實驗室取得IEC 61851-1測試證據並確認SLSI注冊要求。
